string-array.name: ms_titles
string-array.item: Connect and engage with your customers. Anytime, anywhere
Take full control of your customer’s journey
Manage real-time analytics in one dashboard

string-array.name: ms_texts
string-array.item: Communicate with customers or prospects through a wide selection of feedback channels at every touchpoint anywhere, no matter the device.
Analyze your customer’s 360 experience and quickly identify actionable insights and trends.
Easily monitor your business with the role-based, customizable dashboard from anywhere.
Prioritize actions quickly based on customer data to excel their expectations with our closed-loop feedback system with real-time alerts.
Identify your best customers and help them become your brand ambassadors through social referrals with our unique Promoter Amplification system.

resources.string: Your Company Code is the Unique Identification Number/Text for your organisation\'s Customer Experience account. If you don\'t have it yet, please contact your Supervisor for the correct company code.
